items.briefing:
With tax time approaching, Australians are being warned of a surge in tax-themed phishing scams — fake emails or messages designed to steal your personal or financial information by impersonating the ATO or similar authorities. Separately, SAP Concur has flagged increasing financial fraud targeting Australian finance teams, so staff handling invoices or payments should be on high alert for unusual requests.

If you receive an unexpected email about a tax refund, debt, or urgent payment — even if it looks official — do not click any links. Go directly to the ATO website by typing the address yourself to verify.

featured.title: Tax phishing scams surge in Australia, Proofpoint warns
featured.quote: Tax season phishing threatens Australian taxpayers' financial data and credentials during critical deadline period.
